mapper.select:
SELECT CH.COUPON_BOX_ID, CH.USE_YN, CH.ISSUED_DATE, CH.USED_DATE, CH.COUPON_ID, CH.USER_ID,
C.COUPON_NAME, C.COUPON_CONTENT, C.DEDUCTED_PRICE, C.MIN_PRICE, C.EXPIRED_DATE, C.STATUS AS COUPON_STATUS, C.STORE_ID,
S.STORE_NAME,
CASE WHEN C.DEDUCTED_PRICE > 0 AND C.DEDUCTED_PRICE < 100 THEN C.DEDUCTED_PRICE ELSE NULL END AS DISCOUNT_RATE,
CASE WHEN CH.USE_YN = 'Y' THEN 'USED' WHEN C.EXPIRED_DATE < SYSDATE THEN 'EXPIRED' WHEN C.STATUS = 'N' THEN 'DISABLED' ELSE 'AVAILABLE' END AS AVAILABILITY FROM COUPONHAM CH INNER JOIN COUPON C ON CH.COUPON_ID = C.COUPON_ID INNER JOIN STORE S ON C.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID WHERE CH.USER_ID = #{value} ORDER BY CH.USE_YN ASC, CH.ISSUED_DATE DESC

SELECT CH.COUPON_BOX_ID, CH.USE_YN, CH.ISSUED_DATE, CH.USED_DATE, CH.COUPON_ID, CH.USER_ID,
C.COUPON_NAME, C.COUPON_CONTENT, C.DEDUCTED_PRICE, C.MIN_PRICE, C.EXPIRED_DATE, C.STATUS AS COUPON_STATUS, C.STORE_ID,
S.STORE_NAME,
CASE WHEN C.DEDUCTED_PRICE > 0 AND C.DEDUCTED_PRICE < 100 THEN C.DEDUCTED_PRICE ELSE NULL END AS DISCOUNT_RATE,
CASE WHEN CH.USE_YN = 'Y' THEN 'USED' WHEN C.EXPIRED_DATE < SYSDATE THEN 'EXPIRED' WHEN C.STATUS = 'N' THEN 'DISABLED' ELSE 'AVAILABLE' END AS AVAILABILITY FROM COUPONHAM CH INNER JOIN COUPON C ON CH.COUPON_ID = C.COUPON_ID INNER JOIN STORE S ON C.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID WHERE CH.COUPON_BOX_ID = #{value}
mapper.insert:
SELECT COUPON_BOX_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO COUPONHAM ( COUPON_BOX_ID, USE_YN, ISSUED_DATE, USED_DATE, COUPON_ID, USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{couponBoxId}, #{useYn}, SYSDATE, NULL, #{couponId}, #{userId} )
